use_cases: Visual separation between content sections in cards or layouts
Dividing related items in lists or menus
Creating visual hierarchy in page layouts
Spacing and structure in documentation interfaces
ai_summary: A minimalist separator component built on Radix UI primitives. It provides horizontal or vertical dividers for visually separating content sections in various UI contexts. The component uses shadcn/ui's border color utility for consistent styling and supports both decorative and structural separator roles for accessibility.
